title: Swipe Right For Robbery?: Delhi Man, 34, Abducted And Extorted of Rs 7 Lakh In 'Honey Trap' Ordeal
description: A 34-year-old man, Anurup Narula, was abducted and robbed of Rs 7 lakh after being lured into a "honey trap" through a dating app. The victim met a woman named "Sherry" (identified as 20-year-old Harleen Kaur) at Nehru Place on March 25, 2026, where she and four male accomplices ambushed him.
